title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: A video essay argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity and error detection, particularly as teams scale. The author recommends TypeScript over Python for AI coding due to superior language server protocol support, type checking, and build-time error catching that reduce runtime mistakes in AI applications.
